questions.q: Which European country has recently announced a policy shift to reduce screen time in classrooms, prioritizing physical books to enhance learning outcomes in reading, math, and science?
questions.correctText: Sweden has decided to pivot back to physical books in classrooms to reverse declines in reading, math, and science.

questions.q: How many books were recently named as finalists for the prestigious 2026 International Booker Prize?
questions.correctText: Six books were named finalists for the 2026 International Booker Prize.

questions.q: Which major publishing house has reportedly filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging copyright infringement regarding a popular German children's book series?
questions.correctText: Penguin Random House is suing OpenAI over a ChatGPT version of a German children’s book.

questions.q: What is the name of the beloved German children's book series that Penguin Random House claims OpenAI's ChatGPT has infringed upon?
options: Coconut the Little Dragon (Der kleine Drache Kokosnuss)
questions.correctText: The lawsuit concerns Ingo Siegner's popular series, 'Coconut the Little Dragon' (Der kleine Drache Kokosnuss).

questions.q: In which U.S. state was a library director recently dismissed from their position after refusing to comply with directives to remove LGBTQ+ themed books from the library's collection?
questions.correctText: A library director in Tennessee was fired after refusing to remove LGBTQ+ books.
